description: Perform a hydraulic stability audit on the Muncie HEC-RAS model (~/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/) by analyzing conveyance change ratios to identify cross-sections where channel capacity changes abruptly. Using the unsteady flow simulation results (Plan 04, Muncie.p04.hdf), calculate the effective conveyance (K) at the moment of peak flow for every cross-section and the ratio between adjacent sections. Use the formula K = Q / sqrt(Sf), where Q is Total Flow and Sf is Friction Slope at the time step of maximum flow for that specific cross-section (if Sf < 0.0001, set K = 0). Calculate the ratio R = K_upstream / K_downstream for all adjacent pairs. Generate a CSV report at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/conveyance_audit.csv with columns: Upstream_River_Station, Downstream_River_Station, K_Upstream, K_Downstream, Ratio, and Status. The Status column must be 'Warning' if the ratio is < 0.7 or > 1.4, 'Skipped' if K is 0, and 'OK' otherwise. Sort the report by River Station from upstream to downstream.
